name: Persona Identity Verification REST API
what_it_does: Persona identity verification REST API for fintech, marketplaces, and regulated businesses to verify user identities through government ID document verification, selfie biometrics, database verification, and continuous monitoring — enabling automated KYC compliance, fraud prevention, and identity risk management through Persona's configurable identity infrastructure platform. Enables AI agents to manage inquiry management for identity verification workflow creation and session automation, handle document verification for government ID upload and extraction automation, access selfie verification for face match and liveness detection automation, retrieve database verification for SSN, address, and identity database check automation, manage case management for identity review and decision workflow automation, handle monitoring for ongoing identity change and adverse media monitoring automation, access report management for verification audit trail and compliance reporting automation, retrieve webhook management for identity event and status change notification automation, manage template management for verification flow configuration automation, and integrate Persona with onboarding platforms, KYC providers, and compliance systems for identity verification automation.
use_cases: Automating KYC identity verification during user onboarding for fintech compliance agents
Verifying government ID documents and matching selfies for marketplace trust automation agents
Running continuous identity monitoring for existing customers for compliance automation agents
Managing identity review cases and agent decisions for fraud operations automation agents
not_for: Real-time access control and authentication (Persona is identity verification for onboarding, not login/access control)
Enterprise employee background checks (Persona is customer KYC, not HR background screening)
High-throughput identity checks at millisecond latency (document verification takes seconds for ML processing)
best_when: A fintech, marketplace, or regulated business wanting AI agents to automate KYC identity verification, document verification, and ongoing identity monitoring through Persona's configurable identity infrastructure platform.
avoid_when: SANDBOX AND PRODUCTION ARE SEPARATE: Persona has distinct sandbox and production environments; automated environment confusion creates live_verification_in_sandbox for agents using wrong environment credentials; automated must explicitly configure environment per deployment. INQUIRY EXPIRES: Persona inquiries have expiration time; automated indefinite-session assumption creates session_expired for users who don't complete verification within the inquiry TTL; automated must handle inquiry expiration and re-creation. WEBHOOKS REQUIRE SIGNED VERIFICATION: Persona webhooks include HMAC signatures; automated unsigned-webhook assumption creates security_bypass for webhooks processed without signature verification; automated must verify webhook HMAC signatures before processing. GOVERNMENT ID QUALITY AFFECTS SUCCESS: Poor image quality, glare, or partial occlusion causes document extraction failures; automated perfect-capture assumption creates extraction_failed for low-quality document images; automated must prompt users to retake photos when quality checks fail.

auth.notes: Persona uses API key for Identity Verification REST API. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 2018 by Rick Song and Charles Yeh. Raised $200M+ (Series C 2022, $1.5B valuation). Products: Persona KYC, Persona Document Verification, Persona Selfie Check, Persona Government ID, Persona Monitoring, Persona Case Management. 1,000+ customers. Fintech, crypto, marketplace focus. Competes with Onfido, Jumio, and Socure for configurable identity verification.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox environment: free unlimited testing; Production: pay-per-verification
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-verification pricing; volume discounts; enterprise custom pricing; starts ~$1.50+ per verification
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. $1.5B valuation. Pay-per-verification. Free sandbox. 1,000+ customers. Developer-friendly KYC.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; verification APIs throttled per plan

known_agent_gotchas: INQUIRY STATUS IS ASYNC: Identity verifications complete asynchronously; automated sync-result assumption creates empty_result for checking inquiry status before processing completes; automated must use webhooks or poll inquiry status until completed or failed

TEMPLATE DETERMINES VERIFICATION FLOW: Persona templates configure which verification steps run; automated universal-flow assumption creates missing_step for templates not configured with required verification components; automated must select correct template for the compliance use case

PII DATA HAS RETENTION LIMITS: Persona auto-deletes PII after configured retention period; automated permanent-storage assumption creates data_not_found for PII retrieved after retention period expires; automated must retrieve and store PII before retention expiry if long-term storage needed

REDACTION IS IRREVERSIBLE: Persona redaction of PII is permanent; automated reversible-redaction assumption creates permanent_data_loss for PII redacted without backup; automated must be explicit about redaction timing and store necessary data before redacting

REPORT TYPES VARY BY VERIFICATION: Different inquiry types produce different report structures; automated uniform-report assumption creates missing_field for reports expecting fields from a different verification type; automated must parse reports according to the inquiry template type
agent_readiness.security_notes: Identity verification. SOC2, GDPR, CCPA, BSA/AML. API key. US/EU. Government ID, biometric, and PII data.

security_score_components.security_notes: KYC/identity. SOC2, GDPR, CCPA. API key. US/EU. Government ID documents and biometric data.
